metadata.description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite: 4 skills + 7 commands. LazyCodex skill/command always install; its read-only binding is installed when local containment prerequisites exist, while execution requires authenticated Codex + compatible OMO and otherwise fails closed.

plugins.name: oh-my-gjc
plugins.description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite. Skills: gate-briefing, extragoal, insane-review, lazycodex-gjc. Commands: /omg, /omg:setup, /omg:gate, /omg:gate-always, /omg:fable, /omg:insane-review, /omg:lazycodex-gjc. LazyCodex surfaces always install; its read-only runtime binding is prerequisite-dependent and otherwise fail-closed. models.yml remains untouched; release governance stays per-repository.
